basic_details.job_title: BEL Senior Assistant Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Senior Assistant Officer (Ex-Servicemen) E-I Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. 2026-27/06/PK/SAO/004 on the official website https://bel-india.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BEL Panchkula Senior Assistant Officer Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.raw: : 25 June 2026 Last Date for Receipt of Applications: 16 July 2026

qualification.details: Qualification: Degree in Any Discipline (Pass Class) as on 01.06.2026. Experience: JCO rank from Army/Navy/Air Force with minimum 15 years post-qualification experience. Age Limit (as on 01 June 2026): Not exceeding 50 years for General category. Relaxation as per Govt. rules for PwBD.

vacancy_details.details: Post: Senior Assistant Officer (Ex-Servicemen) on Fixed Tenure Basis (E-I Grade) No. of Posts: 1 (Unreserved) Tenure: 15 Years or till superannuation (60 years), whichever is earlier (reviewed every 5 years)

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: Rs. 30,000 - 3% - 1,20,000/- Other benefits include DA, HRA, Professional Development Allowance, Conveyance, PRP, Medical facilities, PF etc.

selection_process: Written Test (85% weightage) Interview (15% weightage) Document Verification Medical Fitness
how_to_apply: Apply Online through official BEL website https://bel-india.in/job-notifications/
Fill the application form carefully and upload required documents.
Keep printout and payment acknowledgement for future reference.
important_instructions: Only Ex-Servicemen (JCO rank) are eligible. Tenure-based contractual post, no claim for regularization. Candidates working in Govt/PSU must submit NOC at interview stage. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download BEL Panchkula Senior Assistant Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download BEL Panchkula Senior Assistant Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Post : Senior Assistant Officer (Ex-Servicemen) on Fixed Tenure Basis (E-I Grade) No. of Posts : 1 (Unreserved) Tenure : 15 Years or till superannuation (60 years), whichever is earlier (reviewed every 5 years)

content_sections.heading: BEL Panchkula Senior Assistant Officer Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Qualification : Degree in Any Discipline (Pass Class) as on 01.06.2026. Experience : JCO rank from Army/Navy/Air Force with minimum 15 years post-qualification experience. Age Limit (as on 01 June 2026) : Not exceeding 50 years for General category. Relaxation as per Govt. rules for PwBD.

content_sections.text: Pay Scale: Rs. 30,000 - 3% - 1,20,000/- Other benefits include DA, HRA, Professional Development Allowance, Conveyance, PRP, Medical facilities, PF etc.

content_sections.heading: BEL Panchkula Senior Assistant Officer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

content_sections.heading: BEL Panchkula Senior Assistant Officer Recruitment 2026 - General Information / Instructions
content_sections.text: Only Ex-Servicemen (JCO rank) are eligible. Tenure-based contractual post, no claim for regularization. Candidates working in Govt/PSU must submit NOC at interview stage. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.

content_sections.heading: BEL Panchkula Senior Assistant Officer Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply
content_sections.text: Apply Online through official BEL website https://bel-india.in/job-notifications/ Fill the application form carefully and upload required documents. Submit before 16 July 2026. Keep printout and payment acknowledgement for future reference.
